subcodes.first_line: The fragrance of the Robe hath been stirred, and the sincere ones have borne witness with sanctification unto God, the Single, the All-Knowing. Verily, whoso hath found it hath been seized thereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد هاج عرف القمیص و اقر المخلصون بالتقدیس لله الفرد الخبیر ان الذی وجد قد اخذه
